description: secretx-signature's Cargo.toml feature for RSA-PSS is named 'rsa-pss' (no key size). The corresponding URI algorithm strings in secretx-local-signing and secretx-aws-kms are both 'rsa-pss-2048', and the SigningAlgorithm enum variant is RsaPss2048Sha256. The implementation in RsaPssSigner explicitly validates a 256-byte (2048-bit) signature length and only accepts RsaPss2048Sha256 backends. The feature name 'rsa-pss' implies generality that the code does not support — it only works for 2048-bit keys. If RSA-PSS-4096 support is added later a new feature would be needed anyway, making 'rsa-pss' semantically misleading now. The consistent name would be 'rsa-pss-2048' to match the URI string and enum variant name. Affected file: secretx-signature/Cargo.toml [features] section and the three #[cfg(feature = "rsa-pss")] gates in src/lib.rs.
title: rsa-pss feature name omits key size; URI uses rsa-pss-2048
